name: Shake It and Bake It Coating
recipeInstructions:
This mixture is sufficient to coat six pounds of chicken.
In a large jar, shake together the flour, salt, pepper, crumbs, paprika, basil, thyme, and garlic powder until evenly mixed. Place the mixture in a plastic bag. If using only 3 pounds of chicken, place half of the mixture in a tightly sealed jar and reserve for later use. Moisten the chicken pieces with milk or water. Place chicken pieces one at a time in the bag and shake until evenly coated. Bake coated chicken pieces in a greased shallow pan at 350 degrees F for 45 - 60 minutes.
